description: Phase 2: Core Loop - Health/hunger survival, full modular building, basic combat, death/respawn, save/load, and HUD completion

userStories.title: Add Health component and damage system to player
userStories.description: As a player, I need a health system so that enemies and hazards can damage me and I can track my survivability.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Health component to player entity with max_health: 100.0 and current_health: 100.0
Add a take_damage method that reduces current_health (clamped to 0)
Add a heal method that restores health (clamped to max_health)
Add slow health regeneration system (1 HP/sec when hunger > 50%)
Player entity is marked as dead when health reaches 0
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: Health component with take_damage/heal/is_dead. Regen system added. Hunger gate deferred to US-002.

userStories.title: Add Hunger component and food system
userStories.description: As a player, I need a hunger system that depletes over time and affects my movement speed when empty.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Hunger component with max_hunger: 100.0 and current_hunger: 100.0
Hunger depletes at 1.0 per 30 seconds of real time
When hunger < 20%, player movement speed is reduced by 30%
When hunger reaches 0, player takes 1 HP damage every 10 seconds
Add Berry item type that restores 15 hunger when used from hotbar
Eating is triggered by right-clicking food in hotbar
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: Hunger component, depletion, speed penalty, starvation damage, Berry item, eating with right-click. Health regen now gated on hunger > 50%.

userStories.title: Add health and hunger bars to HUD
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see my health and hunger status on screen so I can manage my survival.
acceptanceCriteria: Health bar displayed in top-left as text: 'HP: 85/100'
Hunger bar displayed below health as text: 'Hunger: 72/100'
Health text turns red when below 25%
Hunger text turns yellow when below 30%
Both update in real-time as values change
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: Separate StatusHudText for HP/Hunger with color-coded warnings. Red < 25% HP, yellow < 30% hunger.

userStories.title: Add wall building type with snap placement
userStories.description: As a player, I want to build walls so I can create enclosed structures.
acceptanceCriteria: Add WoodWall variant to BuildingType enum
WoodWall recipe: 4 WoodPlank + 2 Stick
Add WoodWall item to inventory ItemType enum
Walls render as taller brown rectangles (16x24) at Z-depth 3.0
Build mode cycles between floor/wall with Q key
Preview shows correct building type shape
Placement consumes correct item from inventory
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: WoodWall added to BuildingType and ItemType. Q cycles types. Preview shows correct size/color.

userStories.title: Add door building type with open/close interaction
userStories.description: As a player, I want doors I can open and close for my structures.
acceptanceCriteria: Add WoodDoor variant to BuildingType enum and ItemType enum
WoodDoor recipe: 6 WoodPlank
Door renders as a narrower rectangle, distinct color from wall
E key toggles nearest door open/closed within 32px range
Open doors change visual appearance (different color or smaller sprite)
Build mode cycles through Floor/Wall/Door with Q key
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: Door component with is_open state. E key toggles. Open doors shrink to 4px wide with transparency.

userStories.title: Add roof building type with transparency when player inside
userStories.description: As a player, I want roofs on my buildings that become transparent when I walk under them.
acceptanceCriteria: Add WoodRoof variant to BuildingType enum and ItemType enum
WoodRoof recipe: 6 WoodPlank + 4 Stick
Roof renders at Z-depth 15.0 (above player) as dark brown square
When player position overlaps a roof tile, that roof becomes semi-transparent (alpha 0.3)
Transparency reverts when player moves away
Build mode cycles through Floor/Wall/Door/Roof with Q key
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: Roof component at Z 15.0. Distance-based transparency (alpha 0.3 when player overlaps).

userStories.title: Add Tier 2 crafting recipes for workbench
userStories.description: As a player, I want more advanced recipes available when near a placed workbench.
acceptanceCriteria: Add CraftingTier enum (Hand, Workbench) to recipe definitions
Existing 10 recipes are marked as Hand tier
Add 10+ new Workbench-tier recipes: WoodWall, WoodDoor, WoodRoof, WoodFence, Chest, Torch, WoodSword, WoodShield, WoodBow, Arrow
Crafting menu only shows Hand recipes by default
When player is within 48px of a placed Workbench, Workbench recipes also appear
Crafting menu shows tier label next to each recipe
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: CraftingTier enum (Hand/Workbench). 10 Hand + 10 Workbench recipes. available_recipes() filters by tier. Tier labels in HUD.

userStories.title: Spawn night enemies (shadow crawlers)
userStories.description: As a player, I want enemies that spawn at night to create danger and tension.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Enemy component with health, damage, speed, and aggro_range fields
Add EnemyType enum with ShadowCrawler variant
ShadowCrawlers spawn during Night phase (cycle time 0.0-0.2) at random positions 300-500px from player
Maximum 5 enemies alive at once
Enemies despawn at Sunrise (cycle time 0.3)
Enemies render as dark purple squares (10x10) at Z-depth 5.0
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: Enemy component with EnemyType::ShadowCrawler. Night spawning with 5-enemy cap. Despawn at sunrise.

userStories.title: Add enemy AI with patrol and aggro behavior
userStories.description: As a player, I want enemies to wander and then chase me when I get close.
acceptanceCriteria: Add EnemyState enum: Idle, Patrol, Chase
Idle enemies pick a random nearby point and patrol toward it at half speed
When player enters aggro_range (default 150px), enemy switches to Chase
Chasing enemies move directly toward player at full speed (80 px/s)
When player leaves 250px range, enemy returns to Patrol
Enemy movement uses simple lerp toward target, no pathfinding needed
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: State machine: Idle->Patrol->Chase. Half speed patrol, full speed chase. 250px disengage range.

userStories.title: Add player melee combat (click to attack enemies)
userStories.description: As a player, I want to attack enemies by clicking on them.
acceptanceCriteria: Left-click deals damage to nearest enemy within 40px range
Base attack damage: 10 HP per hit
Attack cooldown: 0.5 seconds between attacks
Enemy flashes white briefly when hit (or changes color for 0.1s)
When enemy health reaches 0, despawn the entity
Killed enemies drop 1 random item (Stone or PlantFiber)
Attack prioritizes enemies over gathering when both are in range
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: 10 HP per click, 0.5s cooldown. White flash on hit. Random Stone/PlantFiber drop on kill.

userStories.title: Add enemy attacks that damage the player
userStories.description: As a player, enemies should hurt me when they reach me so combat has consequences.
acceptanceCriteria: Enemies in Chase state deal contact damage when within 20px of player
ShadowCrawler deals 5 damage per hit
Attack cooldown per enemy: 1.0 second
Player sprite flashes red briefly when taking damage
Damage is applied to the player Health component
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: Contact damage within 20px, 5 dmg per hit, 1s cooldown. Red flash on player hit.

userStories.title: Add death and respawn system with corpse run
userStories.description: As a player, when I die I should respawn at my spawn point and my items should drop at the death location.
acceptanceCriteria: When player health reaches 0, trigger death sequence
On death, spawn a DeathMarker entity at death position (yellow X sprite)
Transfer all player inventory items to the DeathMarker
Respawn player at world origin (0,0) with full health and hunger
Player starts with empty inventory after respawn
Walking over DeathMarker (within 24px) recovers all dropped items
DeathMarker despawns after items are recovered
Only one DeathMarker exists at a time (new death overwrites old)
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: Death triggers inventory drop to DeathMarker, respawn at origin. Walk over marker to recover items. One marker max.

userStories.title: Add world save system (serialize to disk)
userStories.description: As a player, I want to save my world so my progress persists between sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Add serde Serialize derive to Chunk, Tile, inventory items, player position
Add bincode and serde as dependencies in Cargo.toml
Press F5 to save current game state to 'saves/world.bin'
Save includes: player position, inventory contents, all loaded chunk tile data, placed buildings, day/night cycle state
Creates saves/ directory if it doesn't exist
Shows 'Game Saved!' text on HUD for 2 seconds after save
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: serde+bincode serialization. F5 saves to saves/world.bin. SaveData struct captures all game state.

userStories.title: Add world load system (deserialize from disk)
userStories.description: As a player, I want to load my saved world to continue where I left off.
acceptanceCriteria: Press F9 to load game state from 'saves/world.bin'
Loading restores: player position, inventory, chunk data, buildings, day/night state
Existing world entities are despawned before loading
Chunks are regenerated/replaced with saved data
If no save file exists, show 'No save found' on HUD for 2 seconds
Shows 'Game Loaded!' text on HUD for 2 seconds after load
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: F9 loads from saves/world.bin. Despawns existing buildings, restores all state. Shows save/load HUD messages.

userStories.title: Add minimap to HUD
userStories.description: As a player, I want a minimap in the corner showing my surroundings at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Render a 120x120 pixel minimap sprite in the top-right corner of the screen
Minimap shows terrain colors from loaded chunks at reduced resolution
Player position shown as white dot on minimap
Minimap follows camera/player position
Water tiles shown as blue, land as green, stone as gray on minimap
Minimap rendered at Z-depth 100 (above all game elements)
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: 120x120 minimap following camera, terrain colors from chunks, white player dot at center.

userStories.title: Add tool durability system
userStories.description: As a player, my tools should wear down with use so I need to craft replacements.
acceptanceCriteria: Add durability field to tool items (WoodAxe: 50, WoodPickaxe: 50, StoneAxe: 100, StonePickaxe: 100)
Each gathering action with a tool equipped reduces durability by 1
When durability reaches 0, tool is removed from inventory
HUD shows durability next to tool name in hotbar: 'WoodAxe (45/50)'
Tools without durability (non-tool items) are unaffected
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: Durability field on InventorySlot. Tools show (current/max) in HUD. use_selected_tool() in gathering.

userStories.title: Add building destruction (break placed buildings)
userStories.description: As a player, I want to remove buildings I've placed to fix mistakes or reclaim materials.
acceptanceCriteria: In build mode, left-click on a placed building within 32px to destroy it
Destroying a building returns 50% of its materials to inventory (rounded down, minimum 1)
Building entity is despawned on destruction
Only works in build mode to avoid conflicts with combat/gathering
cargo check passes
userStories.notes: Left-click in build mode destroys nearest building within 32px. 50% material salvage via BuildingType::salvage().
